name: Easy Salad
recipeIngredient: Sandwich and salad sauce with mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear up the bread or cube it for the croutons.
2. Combine the melted butter and garlic powder in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the bread cubes and toss to cover evenly.
4. Spread the cubes on a cookie sheet and bake for 10 minutes in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit, turning once during baking.
5. Cool the croutons.
6. Wash the romaine leaves, using only the most tender inner ones, and dry thoroughly.
7. Tear the leaves into bite-sized pieces and place them in a large bowl.
8. Drizzle with dressing to taste and toss carefully.
9. Serve garnished with Parmesan cheese and croutons.
